commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Looking after a wife and family is a worldly thing. Sometimes, just to keep them happy, it even leads to doing things which ought to be punished. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Basil the Great
commentaries.content: Paul allows marriage and considers it worthy of blessing, but he contrasts it with his own preoccupation with the concerns of God and hints that the two things are incompatible.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: It is far easier to give our whole heart and application without any the least reserve to God, than to divide them without injustice.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
